title: Ophrys crassicornis
taxonomy: Ophrys crassicornis belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified as a type of orchid. It is a species of orchid, and its classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Subfamily: Orchidoideae, Tribe: Orchideae, Subtribe: Orchidinae. The genus Ophrys is a group of orchids commonly known as bee orchids. Within this genus, Ophrys crassicornis is a specific species. It is native to the Mediterranean region.
